name: Historical Trees of Downtown Renton
description: In this collaboration between Renton Forestry, Renton GIS and the Renton Museum, you are invited to stroll a loop of the streets in downtown Renton, starting at City Hall. Existing significant landmark trees in the immediate neighborhood are identified along the way. At each location information will populate in the story map providing details about the tree and the past – people, places, and activities that make up the vibrant history from the last century. Some of these trees are old enough to

name: Renton 10-Year Pavement Preservation Plan
description: Pavement preservation is the process of performing regular maintenance to streets to extend the street’s life cycle and reduce maintenance costs. Pavement preservation reduces the costs of keeping streets in good condition. City streets have a limited life cycle. Traffic, weather, and time cause pavement to deteriorate. Without regular maintenance, streets will begin to crumble and fall apart. If a street deteriorates too much, the repairs can be very expensive, and the street may need to be rec

name: 2023-2028 Transportation Improvement Program (TIP)
description: State law requires the preparation and annual updating of a six-year comprehensive transportation program.The six-year plan shall specifically set forth those projects and programs of regional significance, including funds for any new, enhanced bicycle and/or pedestrian facilities as well as any other applicable changes that promote non-motorized transit. The Transportation Improvement Program (TIP) is a multi-year planning tool that updates the future plans for transportation projects

name: Hydrants of South Renton
description: The South Renton Neighborhood Association, in collaboration with the Renton Municipal Arts Commission, is adding some flair to its neighborhood in unsuspecting spots. Community artists have been "adopting" fire hydrants within the South Renton neighborhood and transforming these everyday objects into incredibly unique works of art.
